messages.content: has furnished to the Owner approved preliminary design the Engineer. translate into English
The Engineer has provided the Owner with an approved preliminary design that is furnished.
into chinese
这位工程师向业主提供了一份经过批准的初步设计。
本履约保函将释放总金额的25%
This performance bond will release 25% of the total amount.
在供应商向业主提供经工程师批准的初步设计后，本履约保函将释放总金额的25%
在供应商向业主提供经工程师批准的初步设计后，本履约保函将释放总金额的25%。
into English、
After the supplier provides the owner with an engineer-approved preliminary design, this performance bond will release 25% of the total amount.
you are a professional lawyer

在供应商向业主提供经工程师批准的最终详细设计后,本履约保函将释放总金额的25%。
After the supplier provides the owner with an engineer-approved final detailed design, this performance bond will release 25% of the total amount.
在供应商车间完成制造和工程师检查并签署相关证书后，本履约保函将释放总金额的25%。
After the supplier completes the manufacturing in their workshop and the engineer inspects and signs the relevant certificates, this performance bond will release 25% of the total amount.
现场交付并收到设备后，将释放本履约保函的25%
Upon on-site delivery and receipt of the equipment, 25% of this performance bond will be released.
upon和after的区别

The terms "upon" and "after" are often used interchangeably, but they can have slightly different meanings depending on the context:

1. "Upon": It suggests that an action or event happens immediately at the same time or very soon after another action or event. It indicates a close connection or immediate response.

Example: Upon receiving the payment, the supplier will ship the goods.

2. "After": It indicates that an action or event occurs subsequent to another action or event, without necessarily implying immediacy. It denotes a time lapse or delay between the two actions or events.

Example: After completing the project, the team celebrated their success.

In summary, "upon" implies a more immediate or simultaneous response, while "after" suggests a time lapse or delay between two actions or events. However, the specific meaning can vary depending on the context in which these terms are used.
